title: Home glucose log review

assessment.text: Specifies hypoglycaemia awareness, home glucose review, BP and BMI, renal testing, urine ACR, HbA1c, cholesterol, podiatry, and retinal review.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Type 2 Diabetes – 30
source.population: Adults with type 2 diabetes; specific diagnostic exclusions are stated for children, pregnancy, and selected conditions.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for adult Dubai telehealth type 2 diabetes review; partial because the baseline workflow has no explicit adult-only filter and is not limited to telehealth.

assessment.text: Specifies hypoglycaemia awareness, home glucose review, BP and BMI, renal testing, urine ACR, HbA1c, cholesterol, podiatry, and retinal review.
assessment.rationale: Relevant to established type 2 diabetes follow-up context, symptoms, complications and clinician review; it does not validate a generic glucose log or infer control.

assessment.text: Lists metabolic decompensation, DKA or hyperosmolar state, infected foot ulcer, profound hypoglycaemia, and rapidly deteriorating complications.
assessment.rationale: Relevant only to clinician-recorded concern features in an established diabetes review and cannot classify an entered reading or urgency.

assessment.text: Specifies clinician review of BP, creatinine, electrolytes, HbA1c, cholesterol, urine ACR, home glucose context, and adherence before medication decisions.
assessment.rationale: Relevant to clinician-led monitoring documentation but does not prescribe frequency or interpret values in this scaffold.
